author: Morgan Lee
headline: Data Science Lead @ Helix Biotech
content: We just open-sourced our feature-store utilities for batch + streaming pipelines. If you’re building ML platforms on Kaggle-style workflows, feedback welcome — link in comments.

author: Priya Nair
headline: Hiring Manager | ML & Analytics
content: Tip for candidates: when sharing projects from public datasets (e.g. job-posting CSVs on Kaggle), spell out **your** feature engineering and validation — not just the leaderboard score.

author: Diego Alvarez
headline: Staff Engineer @ StreamPay
content: Shipped our first Kafka-backed job-ingestion service today. Next: idempotent consumers + DLQ dashboards for recruiter analytics. Distributed systems class finally meets production.

author: Samira Okonkwo
headline: UX Research · Northwind Labs
content: Running mixed-methods studies on how job seekers scan listings. Patterns echo what we see in large open job datasets: clarity on remote/hybrid beats buzzwords every time.
